autoInsightsDescription: Key observations detected from visibility and citation trends.
avgPositionSub: Across all responses where your brand is cited
visibilityAnalyticsDescription: Track how your brand visibility changes across the selected AI models.
aiSentimentDescription: Distribution of responses that mention your brand: positive, neutral, or negative.
factualAccuracyDescription: Share of responses backed by at least one source.
topCitedPagesDescription: Citation coverage across the most referenced URLs.
brandVisibilityDescription: Track your brand performance over time against your competitors.
modelVisibilityMetricDescription: Number of AI responses where your brand is mentioned.
modelVisibilityMetricDescriptionWithComp: With a competitor filter, only co-mentions are counted (your brand + selected competitor).
brandMentionTemplate: {{label}} mentions your brand in {{mentions}}/{{total}} responses in the current scope.
coMentionsTemplate: {{competitor}} is co-mentioned with your brand in {{mentions}} responses out of {{total}} after filtering.
competitionTemplate: {{competitor}} is the most cited competitor in the current scope.
topCitedTemplate: {{url}} is the most cited page by AI in the current scope.
qualityTemplate: The average visibility score across filtered responses is {{score}}/100.
